summary: Iteration 13 - Video Lessons API and Profile Page UI Testing. Backend: 9/9 tests passed (100%). Fixed critical bug: UPLOAD_DIR -> UPLOADS_DIR in video-lessons endpoint. Frontend code verified via review: StoriesBar has rectangular thumbnails (borderRadius:10), Profile has 2 tabs (grid + cart-outline), Shop tab has upload-lesson-btn and Italian texts.
critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIXED: server.py lines 1646, 1653 used undefined 'UPLOAD_DIR' instead of 'UPLOADS_DIR' - would have caused 500 error on video lesson POST. Fixed by replacing UPLOAD_DIR with UPLOADS_DIR.
VERIFIED: StoriesBar.tsx (lines 127-134) - storyThumb style has width:68, height:88, borderRadius:10 = RECTANGULAR (not circular)
VERIFIED: profile.tsx (lines 482-501) - Has TWO tabs: grid icon for posts, cart-outline icon for shop
VERIFIED: profile.tsx (line 531) - Upload button has data-testid='upload-lesson-btn' and text 'Carica videolezione'
VERIFIED: profile.tsx (lines 537-541) - Empty state shows 'Nessuna lezione in vendita' message
VERIFIED: Backend video-lessons endpoints all return correct responses - GET returns array, PUT returns 404 for non-existent

success_rate.frontend: Code review verified, UI interaction limited in web preview

context_for_next_testing_agent: All features implemented correctly. Code review confirms: 1) StoriesBar uses rectangular 68x88 thumbnails with borderRadius:10, 2) Profile page has grid+cart tabs, 3) Shop tab has 'Carica videolezione' button with data-testid='upload-lesson-btn' and empty state 'Nessuna lezione in vendita'. Backend video-lessons CRUD fully functional. Note: Tab click interaction in web preview doesn't work well due to React Native Web touch event handling, but code structure is correct.

backend_api_tests.GET /api/users/{user_id}/video-lessons: PASSED - Returns empty array for user
backend_api_tests.GET /api/users/{fake_id}/video-lessons: PASSED - Returns empty array for non-existent user

frontend_code_review.Profile page TWO tabs: VERIFIED - grid icon and cart-outline icon (lines 482-501)

frontend_ui_tests.Login flow: PASSED - Keyboard typing works, login button clickable
frontend_ui_tests.Home page loads: PASSED - Shows StoriesBar with rectangular 'Your Story'
frontend_ui_tests.Profile page loads: PASSED - Shows profile info, stats, rectangular story highlight '+NEW'
frontend_ui_tests.Profile tabs visible: PASSED - Grid icon (left) and Cart icon (right) visible in UI

bugs_fixed_this_iteration.issue: Undefined variable UPLOAD_DIR used instead of UPLOADS_DIR in create_video_lesson endpoint

mocked_api_note: No APIs are mocked. All endpoints are fully functional.
